case_title: DING BAO SITU VS. MUNA JAMIL HAWATMEH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-08-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY THANH BUI--INSURANCE CARRIER. MR. BUI STATED TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT WAS IN THE HOSPITAL WITH A BLOOD CLOT AND HE ASKED FOR AN CONTINUANCE ON HER BEHALF. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---SAM LAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--SAM CHE--SHUM LAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED 506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY SITU, DING BAO AS TO DEFENDANT HAWATMEH, MUNA JAMIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SITU, DING BAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAWATMEH, MUNA JAMIL $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2013 - JUDGMENT.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HAWATMEH, MUNA JAMIL
